Peace goes

You can have BOTH
without losing yourself

You need a different thinking system

About M.L. Suriya

Business Guru • Spiritual Master • Master Trainer

M.L. Suriya is a renowned guide dedicated to helping individuals and corporate leaders achieve both prosperity and inner peace through the 4-R Life Success System.

Credentials & Achievements:

  • ✓ Authored "How to Double Profits" (Lean Manufacturing) for Govt. of India (NPC)
  • ✓ Doubled the Profit & Peace of 300+ Clients
  • ✓ Government Certified ZED Master Trainer
  • ✓ Certified Master Meditator
  • ✓ 30+ Years in Consulting & Meditation
  • ✓ M.A. in Philosophy & Jainology
  • ✓ B.E. Mechanical Engineering

Philosophy: "Peaceful Profit Monk" - achieving business excellence while maintaining inner peace and spiritual clarity.

300+
Clients Transformed
30+
Years Experience
2X
Profit & Peace
